response.justification: Despite extensive senior-level experience, the candidate lacks junior-level alignment: Java is only listed as a skill without project context, German is only basic (not fluent as required), and the resume reflects a senior/lead profile inconsistent with an entry-level role, raising concerns about overqualification, salary expectations, and cultural fit for a junior position in insurance consulting.
strengths: Extensive full-stack development experience across multiple languages and domains
Strong open-source contributions and technical teaching/mentoring background
Demonstrated proficiency in agile practices, CI/CD, and modern architectures
concerns: German language proficiency is only basic, failing the core requirement for client interaction
Overqualified with 10+ years of senior experience, misaligned with entry-level role
No visible Java project experience despite listing it as a skill; focus is on TypeScript/Node.js/DLang
